requirement_topic.en: Sri Lanka National Electric Vehicle Policy and Import Framework
requirement_topic.zh: 斯里兰卡国家电动汽车政策与进口框架
requirement_topic.zht: 斯里蘭卡國家電動汽車政策與進口框架

summary.en: Sri Lanka issued a National Electric Vehicle Policy to promote EV adoption, reduce fuel import costs, and decarbonise transport. The policy includes preferential import duty concessions for EVs and EV charging equipment, though specific tariff schedules are subject to change by the Ministry of Finance. EV charger importers should verify current Sri Lanka Customs HS classification and applicable import duty rates for EV charging equipment before shipment. No domestic EV charger certification scheme had been formally established as of the knowledge cutoff; SLSI product registration or type-approval may apply — importers must confirm with SLSI.
summary.zh: 斯里兰卡颁布《国家电动汽车政策》，旨在促进电动汽车普及、降低燃料进口成本并推动交通去碳化。该政策为电动汽车和电动汽车充电设备提供优惠进口关税减免，但具体税率表随时可能由财政部调整。电动汽车充电设备进口商在出货前应核实当前斯里兰卡海关HS编码和适用进口税率。截至知识截止日期，斯里兰卡尚未正式建立国内电动汽车充电设备认证制度；SLSI产品注册或型式批准可能适用——进口商须向SLSI确认。
summary.zht: 斯里蘭卡頒布《國家電動汽車政策》，旨在促進電動汽車普及、降低燃料進口成本並推動交通去碳化。該政策為電動汽車和電動汽車充電設備提供優惠進口關稅減免，但具體稅率表隨時可能由財政部調整。電動汽車充電設備進口商在出貨前應核實當前斯里蘭卡海關HS編碼和適用進口稅率。截至知識截止日期，斯里蘭卡尚未正式建立國內電動汽車充電設備認證制度；SLSI產品注冊或型式批准可能適用——進口商須向SLSI確認。

standards_or_laws: Sri Lanka National Electric Vehicle Policy (Ministry of Power and Energy)
Sri Lanka Customs tariff and import duty schedules for EV equipment (subject to update)
SLSI product registration requirements for electrical equipment

summary.en: China has its own EV industry support policies, domestic subsidy schemes, and EV charging infrastructure deployment plans under NEA and MIIT. These Chinese policy frameworks are domestic and have no bearing on Sri Lanka EV policy incentives or import tariff concessions.
summary.zh: 中国在国家能源局（NEA）和工信部（MIIT）框架下制定了本国电动汽车产业扶持政策、国内补贴方案和电动汽车充电基础设施部署计划。这些中国政策框架仅限国内，与斯里兰卡电动汽车政策激励或进口关税减免无关。
summary.zht: 中國在國家能源局（NEA）和工信部（MIIT）框架下制定了本國電動汽車產業扶持政策、國內補貼方案和電動汽車充電基礎設施部署計劃。這些中國政策框架僅限國內，與斯里蘭卡電動汽車政策激勵或進口關稅減免無關。

standards_or_laws: China NEA EV charging infrastructure development plan
MIIT new-energy vehicle industry support policies

gap.en: Sri Lanka's EV policy creates a market opportunity for China-origin EV chargers but does not specify a particular certification scheme or country-of-origin preference. Exporters must confirm the current import duty rate for EV chargers under Sri Lanka Customs, verify SLSI registration requirements, and ensure IEC 62196 connector compatibility to access the Sri Lanka EV market. Duty rates and policy incentives are subject to change — verify before each shipment.
gap.zh: 斯里兰卡电动汽车政策为中国原产电动汽车充电设备创造了市场机会，但未规定特定认证制度或原产地偏好。出口商须确认斯里兰卡海关电动汽车充电设备当前进口税率，核实SLSI注册要求，并确保IEC 62196接口兼容性以进入斯里兰卡电动汽车市场。税率和政策激励随时可能变化——每次出货前均应核实。
gap.zht: 斯里蘭卡電動汽車政策為中國原產電動汽車充電設備創造了市場機會，但未規定特定認證制度或原產地偏好。出口商須確認斯里蘭卡海關電動汽車充電設備當前進口稅率，核實SLSI注冊要求，並確保IEC 62196接口兼容性以進入斯里蘭卡電動汽車市場。稅率和政策激勵隨時可能變化——每次出貨前均應核實。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary — the EV policy creates incentives but does not mandate a specific certification mark for EV chargers as of the knowledge cutoff; SLSI registration may apply
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — China's EV policy incentives are domestic only

source.publisher: Public Utilities Commission of Sri Lanka (PUCSL)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Sri Lanka's National EV Policy creates an import opportunity for EV chargers but does not yet mandate a specific domestic certification scheme. Confirm SLSI registration requirements, current import duty rates, and IEC 62196 connector compatibility before shipping EV chargers to Sri Lanka.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 斯里兰卡《国家电动汽车政策》为电动汽车充电设备进口提供机会，但尚未要求特定国内认证制度。出货斯里兰卡电动汽车充电设备前，需确认SLSI注册要求、当前进口税率和IEC 62196接口兼容性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 斯里蘭卡《國家電動汽車政策》為電動汽車充電設備進口提供機會，但尚未要求特定國內認證制度。出貨斯里蘭卡電動汽車充電設備前，需確認SLSI注冊要求、當前進口稅率和IEC 62196接口兼容性。
